entity.name: KNDW Shelter Solutions AS
entity.description: Norwegian deep-tech company (org. 935285496) building open-source security and governance infrastructure for autonomous AI agents. Backed by Innovation Norway (grant 2026/130689).

projects.name: Super Tanks
projects.description: Compliance-by-design security and governance architecture for autonomous AI agents. Ten simultaneous enforcement layers control what AI agents can and cannot do at the architectural level — every action is mediated before it reaches a tool, model, or the outside world. Built against the OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications (2026) and the EU AI Act. Runs locally/offline, every decision logged, Apache 2.0.

channels.description: Contact KNDW Shelter Solutions AS at wlp@kndw.no to arrange grant or sponsorship funding (bank transfer / invoice).

plans.name: Maintainer & security-hardening time
plans.description: Funds dedicated maintainer time to harden the ten enforcement layers, expand the test suite (currently 1378 tests), and keep pace with emerging agentic-AI threats (MCP supply-chain, prompt injection, memory poisoning).

plans.name: OWASP Agentic Top 10 & EU AI Act conformance
plans.description: Funds documentation and tooling that maps Super Tanks controls to the OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications and EU AI Act articles 12–15, so adopters can use it as a compliance reference implementation.

plans.name: Sustained open-source development
plans.description: Annual support to keep Super Tanks maintained, documented and responsive to community security reports.
